structurePrompt: METAL-DOMINANT PRODUCT STRATEGY. Metal must define the primary silhouette, load-bearing structure, visible frame, joints, canopy, base, and major decorative language. A restrained secondary material may be used only where it improves light diffusion, tactile quality, or premium contrast.
manufacturingPrompt: Use production-realistic metalworking and precise material transitions. Keep secondary materials subordinate, limited in area, and clearly connected through manufacturable interfaces.
avoidPrompt: Secondary materials visually overpowering the metal structure
Fake metallic paint replacing real structural metal
